name: @absolutejs/errors-postgres
description: Postgres-backed, Effect-native IssueStore for @absolutejs/errors. Durable grouped issues + event timeline with new/regression detection in one atomic CTE upsert. Accepts any postgres-js-compatible tag template (porsager/postgres OR @neondatabase/serverless). Lazy schema, jsonb tags/extra, no ORM. Returns Effect<_, IssueStoreError>.
author: Alex Kahn

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --sourcemap --target=bun --external @absolutejs/errors --external effect --external postgres --external @neondatabase/serverless && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.release: bun run format && bun run build && bun publish
